title: February 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 7''' is the 38th day of the year. There are 327 days remaining (328 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Dave Cooper]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Kevin Schon]] is born.
*1958 – [[Alastair Duncan]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Arif S. Kinchen]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 11|''Star Wars'' (1977) 11]] published. The cover date is May.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 53|''Star Wars Weekly'' 53]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Mission to Myrkr (web enhancement)|''Mission to Myrkr'']] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.43|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Comic 6.43]] published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Attack of the Clones Read-Along Storybook and CD]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 43|''Star Wars'' (2015) 43]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 3]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars Insider 216|''Star Wars Insider'' 216]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Mace Windu 1|''Mace Windu'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 5|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 5]] published.
